title: OnePlus Nord N100 OxygenOS 11.0.15.BE81AA
description:
OnePlus Nord N100 OxygenOS 11.0.15.BE81AA

A new software update is available for your Android Smartphone.

This release includes the following:

System

• Integrates the October 2023 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
